mnemonics.title: Platform Strengths
mnemonics.content: **G**AE = **G**reat **A**uto-scaling **E**ngine (PaaS, zero server management). **A**WS = **A**ll **W**ide **S**ervices (broadest portfolio). **A**zure = **A**ctive Directory **Z**one for **U**nified **R**esources with **E**nterprise hybrid cloud.
